title: Crispy Turkish Fry Beans
description: A flavorful and crunchy dish featuring stir-fried beans in a crispy Turkish seasoning blend.

ingredients.name: beans
ingredients.notes: any type of bean, drained and rinsed

ingredients.name: stir
ingredients.notes: stir-fry sauce (or make own with soy sauce and garlic)

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium-high heat.
Add the crushed bitter pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beans and stir-fry sauce, and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add the crushed crispy bread and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until crispy.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
